# FusionSales.ai

> FusionSales.ai builds custom software — CRMs, quote generators, scheduling, and workflow automation — for mid-sized businesses that have outgrown off-the-shelf tools. The pitch: stop renting your software and start owning it. Custom builds ship in weeks (not the year a traditional dev shop took) at a fraction of historical cost, because expert teams paired with AI now build 5–10x faster. A division of Arlogix Inc.

## About

- [Home](https://fusionsales.ai/): What FusionSales builds and why custom software is now within reach for mid-sized businesses. Includes an interactive industry-specific quote-tool demo and a live ROI calculator.
- [What we build](https://fusionsales.ai/#build): Quote & estimate generators, custom CRMs, scheduling tools, project/order tracking, automated workflows, real-time dashboards.
- [Recent work](https://fusionsales.ai/#work): Production builds across sales ops, enterprise comms, behavioral-health credentialing, executive recruiting, beverage retail, and recycling marketplaces.
- [Pricing](https://fusionsales.ai/#pricing): Transparent one-time builds — Starter ~$15k, Core $35k–75k, Enterprise $100k–150k — plus optional ongoing optimization.

## Assessment tools (free, interactive)

- [Operational Efficiency Scorecard](https://fusionsales.ai/tools/efficiency-scorecard): 10-question diagnostic that grades a business A–F on operational efficiency and surfaces its biggest workflow leaks.
- [Manual Work Cost Calculator](https://fusionsales.ai/tools/manual-work-cost): Calculates the annual and 3-year cost of manual work (labor + errors) and the payback period against a custom build.
- [Build vs. Buy Decision Tool](https://fusionsales.ai/tools/build-vs-buy): Six questions that return a clear buy / customize / build recommendation with reasoning.
- [Tech Stack Health Check](https://fusionsales.ai/tools/tech-stack-health-check): Audits a software stack for sprawl, integration gaps, spreadsheet risk, and consolidation opportunities, with a health grade.

## Insights — core ideas

- [The Future Belongs to Companies That Design Their Own Tools](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/the-future-belongs-to-companies-that-design-their-own-tools): The flagship thesis — owning the tools your business runs on is the defining advantage of the next decade.
- [Why Custom Software Is No Longer Just for Enterprise](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/why-custom-software-is-no-longer-just-for-enterprise): How AI and expert teams collapsed the cost of custom software by ~90%.
- [What "Owning Your Software" Actually Means](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/what-owning-your-software-actually-means): Ownership is concrete — the code, the data, and the roadmap are yours.
- [Build vs. Buy: How to Know Which Path Is Right](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/build-vs-buy-how-to-know-which-path): Three numbers that decide the build-vs-buy question.

## Insights — by industry & vertical

- [Custom Software for Commercial Moving Companies](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/custom-software-for-commercial-moving-companies): What to build first for a commercial mover (quoting, scheduling, dispatch).
- [The Case for Custom Software in Manufacturing Operations](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/custom-software-for-manufacturing-operations): The four highest-leverage builds beside an ERP.
- [Healthcare Credentialing Software: Build, Buy, or Customize?](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/healthcare-credentialing-software-build-buy-customize): The honest framework for 10-100 provider operations.
- [What a Custom CRM Looks Like for Insurance Agencies](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/custom-crm-for-insurance-agencies): A thin layer between AMS, carriers, and producer workflow.
- [Why B2B Services Firms Are Building Their Own Software](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/why-b2b-services-firms-build-their-own-software): Why generic CRM data models never fit services firms.

## Insights — for stakeholders & roles

- [A CFO's Guide to Evaluating Custom Software ROI](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/cfo-guide-custom-software-roi): Three numbers, the payback periods to evaluate against, and the risks worth pricing in.
- [What CTOs Should Check Before Approving a Custom Build](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/what-ctos-should-check-before-approving-a-custom-build): Seven specific questions to run before scope-lock.
- [Operations Leaders: The 30-Day Plan to Fix Your Biggest Workflow Leak](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/operations-30-day-plan-fix-workflow-leak): Four weeks, four specific moves.
- [When Your CRM Becomes the Bottleneck — for Sales Leaders](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/when-your-crm-becomes-the-bottleneck): The signs you are there and the three options.

## Insights — definitional & AI-era

- [Custom Software in 2026: What AI Changed (and What It Didn't)](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/custom-software-2026-what-ai-changed): The mechanics-level shift in cost and timeline.
- [How AI Compresses a Six-Month Build into Four Weeks](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/how-ai-compresses-software-builds): Four specific shifts compounding to an 80% timeline reduction.
- [What Is Quote-to-Cash?](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/what-is-quote-to-cash-practical-guide): Practical guide for operations leaders.
- [What Is Workflow Automation?](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/what-is-workflow-automation): The non-buzzword definition + the four categories.

## Contributors

- [Mike Sweigart — CEO](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/authors/mike): Strategy and the case for owning your tools.
- [Lauren Mitchell — CTO](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/authors/lauren): How custom software gets built, and what makes it last.
- [David Chen — CFO](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/authors/david): ROI, payback, and the true cost of manual work.
- [Sarah Patel — Head of Product Strategy](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/authors/sarah): Designing around how people actually work.
- [Evan Brooks — VP of Revenue Operations](https://fusionsales.ai/insights/authors/evan): Quote-to-cash, pipeline, and RevOps efficiency.
